purpose: Validate that Product Director LF can produce a clear product decision with included scope, excluded scope, testable acceptance criteria, risks and handoff without using a project-specific case.

input.product_objective: Define whether a new product block should act as an orientation step before a primary conversion flow.
input.target_user_state: User needs clarity before deciding whether to continue.
input.problem_to_solve: The current experience jumps too quickly to the next action without explaining why the action matters.
input.decision_required: Decide if the block belongs in the current MVP and what it must include.
constraints: no sensitive data capture in the orientation block
input.expected_closure: Product Direction Spec ready for UX/UI and Copy handoff
